title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
